title: othocallis mesopotamica
intro: Othocallis mesopotamica, also known as Mesopotamian flowering plant or Mesopotamian beauty, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Othocallis mesopotamica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
